text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking along the racetrack on
the academy grounds...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Backin' out would bring disgrace on the good folk
of Edo! I say we go all in!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very well. To uphold the honor of the Kongo
Yaegaki style, I shall accept your challenge.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, haha... Inari's at it again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Her fights are famous around the academy after
all! Look, she's already gathered an audience!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah, don't worry. It isn't a literal fight or anything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Inari is always going around challenging people
like that. Even I've had a run-in with her!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Same. One minute, I hear her calling my name,
and the next, I'm getting challenged to a contest.

text_block_list.name: Student Onlookers
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Both Inari and City completed their sets of
bench presses!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Phew... I guess we could call it a draw then?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't be a buzzkill! That was just the warm-up!
Now, how 'bout a deadlift battle?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Fine by me. Seeing as it's come to this, I'm
going no-holds-barred from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, Chiyono O! You do a nice doggy
paddle! Could even consider it top in the country!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so? Am I doing that well? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just watchin' ya has got me all fired up!
Howza head-to-head a doggy paddle battle
sound? Winner treats the loser to some grub!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's like that saying! "Sometimes the mouse
runs right into the cat's paw!" I'm not going to
hold back, you know!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...She kind of goes around challenging everyone
like that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not at all. Well, you can just see for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
In that case, whaddaya say to a 2,000-meter
face-off today?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't have asked for a better proposition! Let
us do battle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the two of them dash off together.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, good stuff! Not bad at all, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same of you. Our duel demanded
my complete focus. Truly, a valuable lesson.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You have my gratitude. Osu!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whazza matter? Why ya bein' so formal all
of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I'd been in a bit of a rut after hitting a wall
in my training. Simply standing on the track would
cause my unease to grow stronger...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But then you called out to me with a passionate
challenge and helped me rediscover the joy of
running!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa now, quit it with the flattery. I only called
out to ya 'cause I wanted to battle!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I was in a similar situation when Inari challenged
me too. I was going through a rough patch and
was feeling quite worried.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's so Inari. It's like her own way of looking out
for the rest of us.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whazzat?! Talkin' 'bout me, are ya? No wonder
my nose was itchin' like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: How about runnin' your legs instead of your mouth? 'Gainst yours truly, the great Inari!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Inari's straightforward energy serves as a
source of support for those around her. Gold City
and Chiyono O break out into smiles at being
"called out" by their peer.
choice_data_list:
For some reason, I feel like getting out there
and running too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Inari's straightforward energy serves as a
source of support for those around her. Gold City
and Chiyono O break out into smiles at being
"called out" by their peer.
choice_data_list:
For some reason, I feel like getting out there
and running too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All righty then! Let's do this, City, Chiyono O! The
rest of ya, keep your eyes peeled!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's gooooo! Full speed ahead!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Hrrraaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the trio engage in an electrifying "fight"
that gets everyone's hearts pumping!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, then let's hit the track together! City,
Chiyono O, and you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And while we're at it, let's open this battle up to
all comers! Form a line if you're ready to rumble!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This is Tracen Academy's first-ever epic fight fest!
Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, the academy's track becomes one
big festival frenzy.
